title: The Woodwright's Shop
description: Roy Underhill's foundational guide to traditional hand-tool woodworking. Covers bench planes, chisels, saws, and classic joinery without electricity.

title: Working Wood 1 & 2: The Artisan Course with Paul Sellers
description: Paul Sellers walks beginners through foundational skills: sharpening, planing, sawing, and building classic projects with hand tools only.

title: The Complete Quinceañera Planner
description: A step-by-step guide covering every aspect of planning a quinceañera from initial budget to the last dance. Includes vendor checklists, timelines, and decoration ideas.

title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time
description: Rick Bayless explores the regional diversity of Mexican home cooking, from Oaxacan moles to Yucatecan ceviches, with recipes accessible to home cooks.

title: Popular Mechanics Complete Home How-To
description: The definitive Popular Mechanics reference for homeowners and renters. Covers every major home repair task with step-by-step instructions and tool lists.

title: Latin Homestyle Cooking
subjects: Latin American cooking;family recipes;Mexican food;Colombian food;comfort food
description: A collection of Latin American family recipes organized by occasion — Sunday dinners, holidays, and celebrations. Practical techniques for home cooks.

title: Popular Mechanics Complete Car Care Manual
subjects: automotive;car maintenance;DIY auto repair;oil change;brake service
description: Covers routine maintenance and common repairs for passenger vehicles. Includes oil changes, brake work, tire rotation, and basic diagnostics.
